
---
title: "Welcome"
format: html
---
<style>
/* ====== Welcome 这一整块的背景（横向铺开） ====== */
.welcome-section{
  padding: 80px 0;                 /* Welcome 区域上下留白 */
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.72), rgba(255,255,255,0.72)),
    url("images/chicago-bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;          /* 横向铺开 */
  background-position: center;     /* 居中 */
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

/* ====== 原来的布局 ====== */
.page-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 40px;

  /* 让内容居中且有最大宽度（否则会贴边） */
  max-width: 3100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 24px;
}

.left-panel {
  width: 260px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  text-align: center;
}

.right-panel {
  flex-grow: 1;
  max-width: 1300px;
}

img.profile {
  border-radius: 50%;
  width: 150px;
  height: 150px;
  object-fit: cover;
}

.icon-link img {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  margin: 0 6px;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

/* 手机端：两列变一列 */
@media (max-width: 900px){
  .page-wrapper{ flex-direction: column; }
  .left-panel{ width: 100%; }
  .right-panel{ max-width: 100%; }
}
</style>

<div class="page-wrapper">

<div class="left-panel">
  <img src="images/profile.jpg" class="profile" alt="Ruoqian Wu">
  <h3>Ruoqian Wu ｜吴若谦</h3>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555;">Always looking for new ideas, collaborators. Feel free to reach out me :)</p>
 <p><a href="mailto:rw41@illinois.edu">rw41@illinois.edu</a></p>
  <p>
    <a class="icon-link" href="mailto:rw41@illinois.edu">
      <img src="https://img.icons8.com/ios-filled/30/000000/filled-message.png" alt="Email" />
    </a>
    <a class="icon-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ruoqian-wu-a036a42b0/" target="_blank">
      <img src="https://img.icons8.com/ios-filled/30/000000/linkedin.png" alt="LinkedIn" />
    </a>
  </p>




<!-- Static visitor map -->
<p style="margin-top: 10px; text-align: center;">
  <a href="https://clustrmaps.com/site/1c7gv" title="ClustrMaps">
    <img src="//www.clustrmaps.com/map_v2.png?d=EZgLnX7M6p3EwaQzgb2MzXEBGMSMBx8ndBjso0VSDmU&cl=ffffff"
         width="180" alt="Visitor Map" />
  </a>
</p>


</p>
</div>

<div class="right-panel">

</div>

<div class="right-panel">

<p>
Hello and welcome! I am a second-year M.S. student in the 
<a href="https://education.illinois.edu/edpsy/programs-degrees/queries" target="_blank">
Quantitative Methods (QUERIES)
</a> program at the University of Illinois Urbana–Champaign (UIUC), where I work under the supervision of 
<a href="https://education.illinois.edu/profile/yan-xia" target="_blank">Prof. Yan Xia</a>. 
I expect to graduate in Spring 2026 and will begin my Ph.D. in Quantitative methods at UIUC  in Fall 2026.
</p>

<p>
My current research interests include:
</p>

<ul>
  <li>
    Developing and applying machine learning and AI-driven methodologies to address complex methodological challenges in behavioral research, with particular emphasis on intensive longitudinal and multimodal data.
  </li>
</ul>


</ul>

</div>
</div>
